title: ElytraBlock
description: A mod that adds a 1-1 conversion elytra block, allowing for the use of elytra's in some mods duplication methods, along with allowing you to stack and hold more than one elytra per slot.
body:
ElytraBlock is a mod that adds a solution to unstackable elytras
Currently, the Elytra Block is the only one. It is crafted from one elytra, and can be crafted back into an elytra. Since this is a block, it is able to be stacked. If you are using a mod that supports duplication (Ex. Nuclear Science/Electrodynamics), you can now duplicate Elytras.
Consider this mod complete as of version 1.0.3
